description: A user-authored proposal to add a perfume to the canonical catalog. Curators review each submission and either publish a corresponding app.smellgate.perfume record (tracked via app.smellgate.perfumeSubmissionResolution) or reject it. There is no status field on the submission itself; resolution is tracked by a separate curator-authored record so submissions remain append-only from the submitter's perspective.

notes.description: Free-form tag strings. Normalized lowercase. Real perfumes list 5-15 notes; 50 is a generous upper bound.

rationale.description: Optional note from the submitter to the curator.
